name: io.github.nntndfrk/checkmarx-mcp
title: Checkmarx One
description: MCP server for Checkmarx One: projects, scans, findings, and triggering scans.

environmentVariables.name: CHECKMARX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key (refresh token) from Checkmarx One IAM → API Keys

environmentVariables.name: CHECKMARX_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL (US default; use eu.ast.checkmarx.net or deu.ast.checkmarx.net for other regions)

environmentVariables.name: CHECKMARX_IAM_URL
environmentVariables.description: IAM base URL (must match region; e.g. eu.iam.checkmarx.net for EU)

environmentVariables.name: CHECKMARX_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default project UUID (optional; tools accept per-call override)

environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: stdio for local MCP clients; http for remote

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: Listen port when TRANSPORT is http

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, or error
